text.title: QA Session-Based Test Management Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: Charter: 'Explore admin bulk role-edit flow'. 90-min session by alice. T=60% B=25% S=15%. Findings: 3 bugs (one S2, two S3), 1 issue (filter architecture question), 2 tasks (docs missing). Debrief: filter inconsistency likely root cause of S2; recommend separate session. Report committed to release/v2.4/sbtm-2026-05-23-001.json.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
